ques: Check ESPN for the score and a brief recap of the latest college football championship game.
answer: In the College Football Playoff National Championship (Jan 19, 2026), Indiana beat Miami 27-21 to win its first national title and finish 16-0. Indiana led 17-0 at half and held off Miami's second-half rally; Carson Beck's late interception sealed it for the undefeated Hoosiers.
